last_cycle.summary: snr_accent_interaction_mock.py: parametric slope ratio 2.40x (accented degrades faster under noise); at SNR≤10dB accented AND-frac collapses to 0.07 vs 0.47 native; WER gap widens 5x at low SNR. 2/2 DoD PASS.
